scripts.build: pkg app/main.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output league-qol.exe && node patch-icon.cjs
scripts.buildrun: pkg app/main.js --targets node18-win-x64 --output league-qol.exe && node patch-icon.cjs && league-qol.exe
scripts.buildcompress: npx esbuild app/main.js --bundle --platform=node --outfile=dist.js && pkg --no-bytecode --public --target node18-win-x64 --output cleague-qol.exe dist.js
